text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh! Trainer, ya wouldn't happen to<n>be feelin'
under the weather, would ya?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now, now, none of that! There ain't nofoolin' my eyes!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that settles it! Today's training<n>will feature
Taiki's Special Happy<n>Course!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The EXTRA happy version! I need tograb me 'bout five hundred partycrackers!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! We'll turn that frown upside<n>down!
Just you wait!
